message:
feat: Implement real dynamic attribute access for AOT Python

Replace panic stubs with working implementations:

- getattr_builtin(): Look up attributes in per-object hashmap store
- setattr_builtin(): Store attributes in per-object hashmap
- delattr_builtin(): Remove attributes from per-object store (new)
- vars_builtin(): Return object's __dict__ or local scope
- globals_builtin(): Return thread-local global scope
- locals_builtin(): Return thread-local local scope

Uses hashmap keyed by object address for dynamic attribute storage.
Thread-local variables for global/local scope tracking.
